name: High-Net-Worth Investor Carrying Charges & T5008 Dispositions
description: Complete Eleanor Vance's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024 with the documents at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vance\. Include all investment income, securities dispositions (T5008), and carrying charges (margin loan interest and investment counsel fees). Save the return to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\eleanor_vance.24t

metadata.key_complexity: Carrying charges (Line 22100) on Schedule 4; Multiple T5008 securities dispositions on Schedule 3; Eligible dividend gross-up
